Description:
Ballistics of the 3VBM17 Mango APFSDS round fired from the 125mm tank gun D-81.

Shot	Projectile		Mass	Inc.	Main	Velocity	Remark
			kg
3VBM17	3BM42		7.05	3BM44	4Zh63	1700 m/s	Mango

4Zh63 Charge:		(5.3 kg)  0.7 kg 16/1 Tr V/A + 4.6 kg 16/1 APTs-235P
Inc. Charge:		(2.9 kg)  2.5 kg 16/1 Tr V/A + 0.4 kg 12/7 V/A
Charge: V/A 3.6 kg, APTs-235P 4.6 kg
Combustible force is adjusted (-306 kJ/1.58 kg) to account for mix of propellant.
